summary: Iteration 101: Serie TV/Anime/Film Market Casting Bug Fixes - VERIFIED. The Serie TV 'Dal Mercato' crash (was 'is not iterable' error) is FIXED. Agency actors ('I tuoi Attori' section) now appear at top in market view. Backend APIs all working (10/10 tests passed).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Serie TV 'Dal Mercato' button no longer crashes (was line 533 destructuring error). 2) Agency actors section ('I tuoi Attori') now appears at top of market view with 'Bonus XP/Fama' badge. User has 1 school student 'Arjun Reddy' and 0 effective agency actors. Active TV series 'SCHIACCIAPENSIERIREI' in casting status for testing.

serie_tv_dal_mercato_crash.fix_description: Changed from 'const [showSkills, setShowSkills] = React.useState ? false : false;' to 'const showSkills = false;'
serie_tv_dal_mercato_crash.verification: Button clicked successfully, no JavaScript errors, market view rendered correctly
